notes: Confirmed booking truth with a current verified route creates one durable plan and future schedule entries.
Unverified or stale route truth blocks reminder scheduling and opens repair.
A due scheduled entry queues through the communication-envelope chain.
Accepted transport remains distinct from final delivery evidence.
Bounce or provider failure creates explicit blocked posture and repair debt.
Cancellation or confirmation drift suppresses future reminder work immediately.
Reminder-change refresh supersedes open schedule entries on the same durable plan.
Contradictory delivery evidence moves the plan into disputed repair posture.
